name: Cardiology
description: Specialty focused on the heart and cardiovascular system, including chest pain, palpitations, exertional symptoms, blood pressure issues and possible circulation-related problems.
symptoms_associated: chest pain, chest pressure, palpitations, shortness of breath, dizziness, fainting, ankle swelling, fatigue on exertion, irregular heartbeat, high blood pressure
indications: persistent chest discomfort, effort-related shortness of breath, recurrent palpitations, syncope, suspected cardiovascular symptoms
red_flags: severe or crushing chest pain, chest pain with shortness of breath, fainting, sudden collapse, chest pain with sweating or nausea

name: Pulmonology
description: Specialty focused on lung and respiratory disorders involving breathing difficulty, chronic cough, wheezing or chest tightness.
symptoms_associated: shortness of breath, chronic cough, wheezing, chest tightness, noisy breathing, cough with mucus, reduced exercise tolerance, pain when breathing
indications: persistent cough, breathing discomfort, asthma-like symptoms, recurrent wheezing, chronic respiratory complaints
red_flags: severe breathing difficulty, bluish lips, coughing blood, chest pain with severe breathlessness, confusion with low oxygen symptoms

name: Neurology
description: Specialty focused on disorders of the brain, spinal cord and nerves, including headaches, weakness, numbness, seizures and cognitive or coordination issues.
symptoms_associated: headache, migraine, numbness, tingling, weakness, tremor, seizures, memory problems, balance problems, speech difficulty, coordination issues
indications: persistent neurological symptoms, recurrent migraine, sensory loss, nerve pain, unexplained weakness, seizure-like episodes
red_flags: sudden paralysis, sudden speech difficulty, sudden facial droop, acute confusion, seizure, sudden severe headache, sudden loss of coordination

name: Gastroenterology
description: Specialty focused on digestive system disorders affecting the esophagus, stomach, intestines, liver and related organs.
symptoms_associated: abdominal pain, bloating, nausea, vomiting, reflux, heartburn, diarrhea, constipation, swallowing difficulty, blood in stool, digestive discomfort
indications: chronic abdominal symptoms, persistent reflux, altered bowel habits, recurrent nausea, suspected digestive tract disorder
red_flags: blood in stool, black stools, severe abdominal pain, persistent vomiting, vomiting blood, dehydration signs

name: Dermatology
description: Specialty focused on skin, hair and nail disorders, including inflammatory rashes, lesions, itching and chronic skin changes.
symptoms_associated: rash, itching, redness, skin lesions, acne, eczema, scaling, dry skin, suspicious mole, nail changes, hives, skin discoloration
indications: persistent rash, chronic itching, suspicious skin lesion, inflammatory skin disease, recurrent flare-ups
red_flags: rapidly spreading rash, skin swelling with breathing symptoms, infected skin lesion with fever, painful blistering rash, rapidly changing mole

name: Otorhinolaryngology (ENT)
description: Specialty focused on ear, nose and throat disorders, including hearing issues, sinus problems, throat symptoms and balance-related complaints.
symptoms_associated: ear pain, hearing loss, tinnitus, sore throat, hoarseness, nasal congestion, sinus pain, nosebleeds, dizziness, swallowing discomfort, ear discharge
indications: persistent ear symptoms, chronic sinus complaints, recurrent sore throat, hearing issues, chronic nasal or throat problems
red_flags: sudden hearing loss, difficulty breathing with throat swelling, severe nosebleed, persistent hoarseness, severe swallowing difficulty

name: Ophthalmology
description: Specialty focused on eye and vision disorders including red eye, visual changes, pain, irritation and sudden loss of sight.
symptoms_associated: red eye, eye pain, blurred vision, vision loss, double vision, photophobia, tearing, foreign body sensation, flashes, floaters, swollen eyelid
indications: persistent eye symptoms, unexplained visual disturbance, recurrent painful red eye, progressive blurred vision
red_flags: sudden loss of vision, severe eye pain, chemical eye injury, red eye with photophobia, eye trauma, flashes with sudden visual change

name: Rheumatology
description: Specialty focused on inflammatory and autoimmune conditions affecting joints, connective tissue and sometimes muscles.
symptoms_associated: joint pain, joint swelling, morning stiffness, joint warmth, back pain, muscle pain, fatigue, reduced mobility, hand pain, wrist pain, swollen fingers
indications: chronic joint pain, inflammatory joint symptoms, stiffness worse in the morning, suspected autoimmune musculoskeletal disease
red_flags: rapid joint swelling with fever, severe functional limitation, hot swollen joint, unexplained systemic inflammation symptoms

name: Endocrinology
description: Specialty focused on hormone-related disorders such as thyroid disease, diabetes and metabolic regulation problems.
symptoms_associated: fatigue, persistent thirst, frequent urination, weight gain, weight loss, heat intolerance, cold intolerance, mood changes, tremor, dry skin, hair loss
indications: suspected hormonal disorder, thyroid-related symptoms, unexplained metabolic symptoms, persistent thirst or urination, endocrine imbalance suspicion
red_flags: confusion with severe dehydration, excessive thirst with significant weakness, unexplained rapid weight loss, severe endocrine instability symptoms

name: Nephrology
description: Specialty focused on kidney disorders, fluid balance, electrolyte issues and chronic kidney-related symptoms.
symptoms_associated: swollen ankles, swollen feet, swollen hands, blood in urine, fatigue, nausea, reduced urine output, high blood pressure, shortness of breath, flank discomfort
indications: suspected kidney disease, persistent edema, recurrent abnormal urine symptoms, chronic kidney-related complaints
red_flags: blood in urine, very reduced urine output, severe swelling, shortness of breath with fluid retention, severe kidney-related deterioration

name: Urology
description: Specialty focused on urinary tract and male genitourinary disorders, including urination problems, bladder symptoms and blood in urine.
symptoms_associated: pain when urinating, blood in urine, urinary urgency, urinary frequency, pelvic discomfort, flank pain, urinary retention, weak urine stream, recurrent urinary infections
indications: persistent urinary symptoms, lower urinary tract symptoms, recurrent hematuria, suspected bladder or prostate-related issues
red_flags: visible blood in urine, inability to urinate, severe flank pain, fever with urinary symptoms, clots in urine

name: Gynecology
description: Specialty focused on female reproductive health, pelvic symptoms, menstrual disorders and abnormal bleeding or discharge.
symptoms_associated: pelvic pain, lower abdominal pain, painful periods, heavy periods, irregular bleeding, bleeding after sex, unusual vaginal discharge, pain during sex, menstrual abnormalities
indications: persistent pelvic symptoms, abnormal uterine bleeding, recurrent gynecological symptoms, chronic menstrual complaints
red_flags: severe pelvic pain, heavy vaginal bleeding, fainting with pelvic pain, pelvic pain in pregnancy, fever with pelvic pain

name: Psychiatry
description: Specialty focused on mental health disorders affecting mood, behavior, perception and emotional regulation.
symptoms_associated: persistent sadness, anxiety, panic attacks, hopelessness, sleep disturbance, loss of interest, irritability, poor concentration, mood instability, suicidal thoughts
indications: persistent mood symptoms, severe anxiety, functional impairment due to mental health symptoms, recurrent psychiatric distress
red_flags: suicidal thoughts, self-harm thoughts, psychosis, extreme agitation, severe depressive state, inability to ensure personal safety

name: Infectious Diseases
description: Specialty focused on infections with systemic symptoms such as fever, chills, unexplained inflammation or complex recurrent infections.
symptoms_associated: fever, chills, night sweats, fatigue, unexplained weight loss, swollen lymph nodes, persistent cough, rash with fever, recurrent infections, generalized weakness
indications: persistent fever, recurrent or unclear infection, systemic infectious symptoms, travel-related or unusual infectious presentation
red_flags: high fever with confusion, stiff neck, difficulty breathing with fever, rash with severe illness, signs of sepsis

name: Orthopedics
description: Specialty focused on bones, joints, ligaments, tendons and mechanical musculoskeletal injuries or structural disorders.
symptoms_associated: bone pain, joint pain, back pain, knee pain, shoulder pain, trauma-related pain, swelling after injury, limited movement, instability, deformity
indications: injury-related musculoskeletal pain, persistent localized joint or bone pain, movement limitation, suspected structural orthopedic condition
red_flags: deformity after trauma, inability to bear weight, severe limb swelling after injury, suspected fracture, sudden loss of function after trauma
